name: Jewelry Cabinet with Mirror - Brightroom™: Full-Length Organizer, MDF, Rectangle, White, 60.75" Height, 5 Pieces
description:
So many ways to organize your way with the Accessory Organizer with Mirror from Brightroom. Offering ample storage space for rings, earrings, necklaces, bracelets and more. Built-in adjustable, tilting mirror provides customization to your space. Includes a base shelf for extra storage. Versatile styling in a black and white finish easily matches with a range of decor styles. Best of all, the included hardware makes self-assembly a breeze. Follow installation and capacity guidelines. It is normal for produced goods to have a slight odor as part of production, for best results open the cabinet door to dissipate in open air.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
